files: outlines/prompts.py
summary: Adding custom filters param to prompt decorator, from_str/from_file, and create_jinja_env helper

fields.summary: Adding custom filters param to prompt decorator, from_str/from_file, and create_jinja_env helper

content:
type: INTENT
files: outlines/prompts.py
summary: Done: added create_jinja_env(loader, filters) helper (registers built-in filters then updates with custom filters dict), prompt(fn=None, *, filters=None) supports @prompt and @prompt(filters=...), Prompt.from_str/from_file now take optional filters param and pass to _template_from_str/_template_from_file which call create_jinja_env. Suggest your register_filter/unregister_filter update a module-level dict that create_jinja_env merges in (base filters -> global registry -> per-call filters) to avoid clobbering my changes; happy to merge if you show me your diff first.

fields.summary: Done: added create_jinja_env(loader, filters) helper (registers built-in filters then updates with custom filters dict), prompt(fn=None, *, filters=None) supports @prompt and @prompt(filters=...), Prompt.from_str/from_file now take optional filters param and pass to _template_from_str/_template_from_file which call create_jinja_env. Suggest your register_filter/unregister_filter update a module-level dict that create_jinja_env merges in (base filters -> global registry -> per-call filters) to avoid clobbering my changes; happy to merge if you show me your diff first.
